top_story.headline: As the Democratic primary heats up, Republican Tom Tiffany has campaigned for governor on his own terms
top_story.summary: The contentious Democratic primary for Wisconsin governor has given Republican U.S. Rep. Tom Tiffany a chance to campaign on his own terms. He's presented himself as quintessentially Wisconsin but down played his partisan voting record and his ties to President Donald Trump.
